---
title: "The architecture: template, instance, wiki, fabric"
description: "The load-bearing distinction is three layers earlier drafts collapsed: tools install into the instance, but subtype and bundle-publishing are properties of the wiki, and the instance is the hub."
date: "2026-07-20"
categories: [research-agents, architecture]
draft: true
---

::: {.callout-note title="Status"}
**Design.** The intended approach, not yet implemented.
:::

**Thesis.** The load-bearing distinction is three layers earlier drafts collapsed: tools install into the instance, but subtype and bundle-publishing are properties of the wiki, and the instance is the hub.

**Draws on.** Drawn from the wiki's Ecosystem-Architecture; the diagram lives in the flyer and the data-fabric appendix.

## Outline

- 
- 
- 

_Stub. Expand from the seed page(s) above._
